title: [ExportVerilog] Make ExprEmitter sensitive to assignment-like context

features.name: struct with nested unpacked array of struct in assignment
features.description: Code should include a struct type containing an unpacked array of struct, used in an assignment context
features.snippet:
struct packed {struct packed {logic sink; }[0:0] mem; } bar;
assign bar = '{mem: {'{sink: 1'h0}}};

features.name: assignment pattern inside concatenation context
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern '_{...} used inside a concatenation {...} which is invalid Verilog

features.name: packed struct with array member in assignment pattern
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing an array member used in an assignment pattern expression
features.snippet:
struct packed {logic [7:0] data; } s;
assign s = '{data: 8'h0};
